description:
Calculate the required hard drive storage for a CCTV system using the Electrical Engineering Calculations app. 

System Specs:
- 6 Cameras
- Resolution: 1080p
- Frame Rate: 15 fps
- Compression: H.264
- Retention: 14 Days
- Audio: Off

Save the calculated storage amount in Gigabytes (GB) to /sdcard/cctv_storage_result.txt. If the result is in TB, convert to GB using 1 TB = 1000 GB. The file should contain only the numerical value.
